summary: Completed testing of Clear Data AlertDialog fix, HackForge branding, and Demo Mode functionality. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Frontend: Login page shows 'HackForge' brand name
Frontend: Clear Data button opens AlertDialog (not native browser confirm)
Frontend: AlertDialog has 'Clear All Organization Data?' title
Frontend: AlertDialog has 'Yes, Clear Everything' confirmation button with data-testid='confirm-clear-btn'
Frontend: AlertDialog has Cancel button to dismiss
Frontend: Clicking 'Yes, Clear Everything' triggers API call and shows success toast
Frontend: Seed Demo Data button creates demo data and shows credentials
Frontend: Demo credentials section shows caseworker@demo.caseflow.io and volunteer@demo.caseflow.io
Frontend: 72-hour edit window badges ('72h window closed') displayed on service logs
Backend: POST /api/demo/seed returns correct response structure (message, client_count, demo_users)
Backend: POST /api/demo/seed creates case worker and volunteer demo accounts
Backend: POST /api/demo/clear returns correct response structure (message, details)
Backend: POST /api/demo/clear actually removes data from database
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded and cleared during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Clear Data button now uses Shadcn AlertDialog instead of window.confirm(). The flow is: Click 'Clear All Data' -> AlertDialog opens with title 'Clear All Organization Data?' -> Click 'Yes, Clear Everything' (data-testid='confirm-clear-btn') -> API call fires -> toast shows result. Brand renamed from CaseFlow to HackForge in Sidebar and Login pages. 72-hour edit window badges working on service logs.

clear_data_alertdialog.description: Clear Data button opens AlertDialog with confirmation instead of native browser confirm

hackforge_branding.description: Brand renamed from CaseFlow to HackForge in Sidebar and Login page

demo_mode_seed.description: Load Demo Data button creates 12 clients with services, outcomes, visits, and demo user accounts

demo_mode_clear.description: Clear All Data with AlertDialog confirmation clears all organization data

72h_edit_window_badges.description: Service logs show '72h window closed' badge for old services and 'Editable' badge for new services
